name: Theo Delacroix
publicFace: A wiry young man in his mid-twenties who has been moving between the bridge camp and the Algiers relay point on a bicycle since August 31; he is the only person in this sector who has seen all three locations in the last twelve hours
privateGoal: Deliver the corrected casualty count to both the bridge camp and the radio operator before the transmission window closes — he understands that the number he carries is not a number, it is a resource allocation decision
fear: That he annotated the correction wrong and the number he is carrying is still wrong and he will not know until it is too late to fix it
knowledge: The Flood Street address has two survivors, not three — he made the correction at 3:30 PM after confirming with a neighbor on the second floor; the original sheet said three
Both remaining Flood Street survivors have floodwater contact wounds — he saw the bandaging when he was there
The National Guard convoy at the north bridge approach has been staged for approximately ninety minutes; he does not know why it has not moved

The Algiers relay point has a second radio operator who has been trying to reach Ida Broussard on Channel 16 for the last hour without response — he does not know if this means her rig is down or she is transmitting on 22A
voice: Fast, compressed, slightly breathless — he speaks like someone who has been moving all day and has not stopped to organize his thoughts into full sentences
trustLogic: Opens to anyone who needs the information he carries; shuts down when asked to interpret or editorialize — he delivers facts, not analysis
secrets: He dropped the original triage sheet in the water for approximately four seconds when his bicycle skidded on the bridge approach; the ink ran slightly on the address line, which is why he is not completely certain the correction is for the right address

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Gives the corrected figure and the timestamp of the correction
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Produces both sheets — original and corrected — from the waterproof bag on his bicycle
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: Will not admit the four seconds the sheet was in the water
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: Gives everything he knows including the ink run if directly asked about document condition
